requirement: Upgrade from 4 alert types to 12, real-time pattern detection, alert-to-investigation linking, dashboard views

tasks.title: 12 surveillance patterns + alert-investigation link + dashboard
tasks.description:
Enhance surveillance from basic threshold checks to a comprehensive pattern detection system.

Part A — Add 8 more alert pattern constants to types.go (4 already exist):
Existing: LARGE_TRADE, WASH_TRADE, PRICE_SPIKE, VOLUME_ANOMALY
Add: ALERT_FRONT_RUNNING, ALERT_SPOOFING, ALERT_LAYERING, ALERT_INSIDER_TRADING, ALERT_MARKET_MANIPULATION, ALERT_CONCENTRATION, ALERT_UNUSUAL_ACTIVITY, ALERT_CROSS_MARKET

Part B — Enhance checkSurveillance in engine.go:
Add pattern checks (simplified for each):
- FRONT_RUNNING: same participant has resting order filled right before a large trade from another participant
- SPOOFING: participant submits and cancels >3 orders within 60 seconds
- LAYERING: >5 resting orders from same participant on same side
- INSIDER_TRADING: trade on instrument with pending corporate action
- MARKET_MANIPULATION: price moved >5% from reference in single session
- CONCENTRATION: single participant holds >20% of daily volume
- UNUSUAL_ACTIVITY: trade volume >3x average daily volume
- CROSS_MARKET: same participant trading correlated instruments simultaneously (simplified: same participant trading >3 different instruments in 1 minute)

Part C — Alert-to-investigation linking:
Add AlertID field to InvestigationCase if not present.
Modify handlers_investigation.go: when creating investigation from alert, set AlertID and auto-update alert status to INVESTIGATING.

Part D — Surveillance dashboard endpoint:
Create handlers_surveillance_dashboard.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/surveillance/dashboard — aggregate view:
  - total_alerts (by status: open/investigating/resolved)
  - alerts_by_type (count per pattern)
  - top_firms (firms with most alerts)
  - top_instruments (instruments with most alerts)
  - recent_alerts (last 10)

Update server.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for enhanced surveillance
tasks.description:
Write tests.

1. engine_test.go — append:
- TestSurveillance_12Patterns_Constants — verify all 12 constants defined
- TestSurveillance_FrontRunning — trigger front running detection
- TestSurveillance_Concentration — single participant >20% volume → alert
- TestSurveillance_InsiderTrading — trade on instrument with pending CA → alert

2. handlers_surveillance_dashboard_test.go:
- TestDashboard_Empty → all zeros
- TestDashboard_WithAlerts → counts by status/type populated
- TestDashboard_TopFirms → firms ranked by alert count

3. handlers_investigation_test.go — append:
- TestCreateInvestigationFromAlert — alert status updated to INVESTIGATING

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
